about.title: About
about.content:
I'm not about marketing.
I'm about structure, meaning and perception.
People don't buy square meters — they buy reliability.
This space collects frameworks and insights on how to build products that sell trust.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content:
Want to discuss your project?
Sometimes I help teams turn chaos into product systems.
